description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a pixelated, retro design, primarily in white and red colors. The front panel displays the text 'JONCO JUST MILK with... VITAMIN X' in bold, blocky letters, and a red cap is visible on the top. One side features a barcode and a 'GRADE A' label, while the opposite sides display 'MISSING' person notices with pixelated silhouettes and text, mimicking classic milk carton designs. The carton has a folded top with a screw cap positioned off-center, adding a functional detail. The overall appearance is stylized and playful, with a strong emphasis on geometric shapes and pixel art graphics.
description: A white and red rectangular juice carton with pixel art graphics, a red screw cap, and 'MISSING' notices on the sides. The front features bold branding and vitamin information.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with a barcode, 'GRADE A' label, and pixelated graphics in red and purple.
description_view_1: This view displays one of the 'MISSING' person notices with pixelated silhouettes and detailed text, along with the red screw cap on top.
description_view_2: This is the front view, featuring the main branding 'JONCO JUST MILK with... VITAMIN X' and the red cap on top.
description_view_3: This view shows the other 'MISSING' person notice, similar to view 1, with the cap visible from a different angle.
attribute_brand_label: JONCO JUST MILK with... VITAMIN X
